title: food armor
description: a mod that adds food armor
body:
hello,

have you ever had to much food?

well introducing food armor!







it makes it so if you put on full set of some armor

it will give you special effects

this mod is good with pvp

we are happy for you to download

download or share whith frends

if you dont want to look at the

page over and over to see the recipes get jei or rei

https://modrinth.com/mod/rei](https://modrinth.com/mod/rei







also i didnt add rotten flesh,spider eye,poisones potato and pufferfish armor sorry :(

i will eventually add it

also check images to find recipes

also if there is any gliches plz comment the glich

bon apatite

mod maker 1 :)
